member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Core.ErrorHttpMapping
member.summary: Maps MonadicSharp values to HTTP status codes, following RFC 9110 semantics.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Core.ErrorHttpMapping.ToHttpStatusCode(MonadicSharp.ErrorType)
member.summary: Returns the HTTP status code that best represents this .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Core.ErrorHttpMapping.ToHttpStatusCode(MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Returns the HTTP status code that best represents this .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Azure.Core.ErrorHttpMapping.ToHttpStatusInt(MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Returns the integer HTTP status code for this .

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Azure.Core.MonadicProblemDetails
member.summary: RFC 9457-compliant problem details record, built from a MonadicSharp . Serializes cleanly to JSON for HTTP error responses.
